name: 5G-enabled Multi-user Presence and Activity
summary: Open SDR-based wireless CSI dataset covering sixteen combinations of occupancy and simultaneous activities for assisted living.

hardware.wifi_standard: Custom OFDM rather than commodity WiFi

settings.scenario: Empty room and activity combinations with up to four people

standardization.notes: Tag as SDR-OFDM CSI, not commodity WiFi CSI, while sharing the canonical tensor representation.
